author: Verified Reviewer
pros: High resolution outcome ..high response. No freezing
cons: Eyse installtion and free vergin avaliable

description: Love the app. Many different options to creating content for my business. Makes perfect images and user friendly
author: Kristen G.
pros: Helps create image and content for my business. Easy to use and helps tremendously with making my products more desirable
cons: Have to pay for upgraded versions and sometimes is the app glitches and I have to reinstall but overall great experience

author: Sierra B.
pros: What I like most about PhotoRoom is the variety of background options for photo editing
cons: What I least like about PhotoRoom is with editing sometimes it takes out more thanbyou wanted specifically when cutting out a person to put in a different background and when adding shadow.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I love it and use it often for my social media content. Cleans up photos well and many different options to choose from.
author: Debra G.
pros: Great for photo editing and producing content. Easy to navigate. Cleans up photos nicely. Many options to choose from.
cons: The paid version has a lot more options but the free one is great too. Very happy with Photoroom. No dislikes.

description: Best to save all your promotion in the market
author: Douarou J.
pros: Best to edit and creation picture promotion for brand
cons: Fast and easy to use to help mores products to be discovered
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Une grande déception des changements de règles en cours d'abonnement
description: très décevant, ne respecte pas les conditions de l'abonnement initial et change les règles en cours de route. Ne fait donc pas sérieux, car cela veut dire qu'à tout moment ils peuvent faire ce qu'ils veulent et ne pas respecter leur engagement initial
author: Didier C.
pros: A l'origine le téléchargement en lot....mais après avoir payé l'abonnement les règles changent en cours de route, on nous impose 500 téléchargements en lot par mois, si vous voulez plus il faut payer un abonnement supplémentaire, inadmissible et non respect de l'abonnement initial.
cons: Des règles qui changent en cors d'abonnement, l'impossibilité de contacter quelqu'un rapidement, délai de réponse 2 jours ce qui est loin d'être très professionnel. Le seul interlocuteur est un robot 🤔
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Way C.
pros: I like that I can resize and remove backgrounds on my phone fairly quickly and easily.
cons: The export to my other device, or drive is not as simple as it should be.

description: It was a wonderful experience that helped me solve many technical and objective problems, both in creating and generating images. Thanks to photoRome, I learned a lot, made money from printing on demand, and fought poverty and unemployment. Thanks photoRome developer
author: rabii S.
pros: One of the answers that I found in this great application. First, the ease of work and fluidity in creating everything I imagine by giving me a sense of greatness and happiness through the method of creating images with artificial intelligence.
cons: I see the negatives through the method of creating images and the method of work in the lack of a mechanism for generating images through voice expression instead of the written request. This is what I see negatively as well. With regard to the language, it does not support several languages, and also among the disadvantages of not launching the photoRome application. Taking advantage of the free plan gives the user the opportunity to purchase the paid plan or gold
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, a great and easy to use app with quick background remove feature along with AI backgrounds and easy editing.
author: Harsharan Deep S.
pros: The ease by which we can edit and cutout a dress in an instant is amazing. Clean and quick AI features and backgrounds are great to have. So useful. The most used feature for me was the instant subject cutout to remove the background.
cons: Sometimes the AI backgrounds are not clean and looks low quality. We can fix that after some editing and efforts but that takes sometime.

author: Leandro P.
pros: Just easy and intuitive to use.The quality is grate.
cons: Lacking have tools to put text over the pictures you just worked o it.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Esta aplicacion me ha sido muy util ya que no solo me permite eliminar los fondos de las imagenes sino que tambien me permite mejorarla calidad de las imagenes, en multiples ocaciones suelo aplicar filtros de Photoroom a las imagenes para que los productos luzcan mas llamativos para las campañas de marketing
author: Silvia A.
pros: Lo que me gusta de Photoroom es que tiene diferentes secciones con diversas herramientas que permiten convertir las fotos en verdaderas obras de arte en tan solo un par de clicks
cons: a pesar de que los resultados del removerdor de fondos es impresionante, hay algunos casos en que la herramienta no logra distingir entre el sujeto y el fondo y quedan fragmentos que hay que corregirlos manualmente y no siempre queda bien.

description: Uso o photoroom há alguns meses, pedi indicação a minha professora de confeitaria, pois queria deixar a foto dos meus bolos mais bonita e como via ela utilizando eu fiquei interessada e ela me passou o link pra eu utilizar e estou gostando bastante, também já indiquei a outras pessoas que estão gostando muito.
author: Elisa S.
pros: Gosto de poder tirar minhas fotos em qualquer lugar e depois remover o fundo com ele. Fico mais tranquila.
cons: Não tenho nada o que reclamar. Pois me atende perfeitamente.

review_title: Elimina fondos de imagenes en un par de clicks
description: PhotoRoom me a ayudado a ahorrar un monton de tiempo cuando necesito eliminar fondos de imagenes de forma rapida y precisa, es muy facil de usar y con solo un par de clicks ya la tienes lista para usar y exportar.
author: Michael R.
pros: Lo que mas me a gustado de PhotoRoom son los backgrounds generados por inteligencia artificial que se pueden colocar a nuestras imagenes una vez eliminado el fondo, el resultado es espectacular y puedes elegirlos por categorias
cons: lo que no m gusta de PhotoRoom es que que cuando quiero eliminar el fondo de una imagen si esta muy cargada de elementos le cuesta detectar los bordes y corta partes de la imagen que no deberia,

author: roberta B.
pros: la versatilità del programma con molte funzioni di editing e scontorno fondo
cons: sarebbe bello poter editare anche un piccolo video

author: fabio Z.
pros: molto facile da usare anche in Team sia da pc che smarphone
cons: al momento non trovo particolari svantaggi, forse un po lento da pc

review_title: Progetti creativi e grafica social in un semplice click ... davvero !
description: La utilizzo per scontornare le immagini in un click e porre qualsiasi tipo di sfondo in maniera rapida e professionale. Lo utilizzo molto per i social e per le immagini di prodotti e-commerce.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Da brevi videoclip a semplici immagini, tutto si può trasformare dando un tocco di professionalità assoluta, non c'è limite alla creatività. Tutto davvero molto semplice, si parte da una foto ed il gioco è fatto. Ci sono centinaia di formati e di sfondi pronti da utilizzare in ogni progetto editoriale sia per i social che per il marketing web più evoluto.
cons: Al momento non ho individuato nulla di negativo. Ho utilizzato la versione free, per cominciare, già molto completa, ma ovviamente viene apposto il watermark su tutti i files elaborati e scaricati. Sono passato alla PRO ben volentieri, anche se è un pò cara rispetto alla concorrenza.
